title: limonium × coriacifolium
intro: Limonium × coriacifolium, also known as sea lavender, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family, resulting from the cross between Limonium binervve and Limonium pungens. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Limonium × coriacifolium include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
